+--------------------+
|  Input Stage       |
|    +--------+      |
|    |  Read  |      |
|    +----+---+      |
|         |          |
|         v          |
|    +---------+     |
|    |  Parse  |     |
|    +----+----+     |
|         |          |
|         |          |
|         |          |
+---------+----------+
          ++
+----------+---------+
|  Transform Stage   |
|          |         |
|          v         |
|   +------------+   |
|   |  Validate  |   |
|   +------+-----+   |
|          |         |
|          v         |
|    +-----------+   |
|    |  Convert  |   |
|    +-----+-----+   |
|          |         |
|          |         |
+----------+---------+
           +------+
+-----------------+--+
|  Output Stage   |  |
|          +------+  |
|          v         |
|    +----------+    |
|    |  Format  |    |
|    +-----+----+    |
|          |         |
|          v         |
|     +---------+    |
|     |  Write  |    |
|     +---------+    |
|                    |
|                    |
+--------------------+
